what_it_does: A preview card (@dsCard group="Brand") for the Vi AI-framework mark: a two-column layout with the Vi vessel (a diamond with line-fill carrying the traced V glyph) rendered on the left via CV_SHAPES.markSVG('vi'), and explanatory copy on the right describing Vi as the internal AI system.
observations: Loads cv-vi-glyph.js and cv-shapes.js; the mark is injected by an IIFE calling CV_SHAPES.markSVG('vi', {size:150}).
Copy names Vi as powering User Portal, Property Wizard, and Virtual Hubs.
Explicitly states the mark uses the exact same vessel as the Shape system — both call CV_SHAPES.markSVG('vi').
Meta line records shape (diamond · line-fill), glyph (traced V / CV_VI_GLYPH), and source (CV_SHAPES.markSVG).
Highlighted product names use a .a class colored --accent-gold.
standouts: Asserts the Vi mark is not a separate asset but the same registry-rendered vessel as the shape system ('vi' shape type).
The V is described as the canonical glyph traced from the logo (CV_VI_GLYPH).
conventions: Single-source reuse — the brand mark is generated from the same renderer as the shape vocabulary, not duplicated.
Tokens via var(--…) for colors and type.
notes: The brand card establishing Vi's mark as a registry-generated 'vi' vessel (diamond + traced V), single-sourced from CV_SHAPES rather than a standalone logo file.
questions: What exactly does the traced-V glyph (CV_VI_GLYPH) look like and how is it composited inside the diamond vessel?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — subtitle (diamond with line-fill + traced V glyph, same vessel as Shape system, from CV_SHAPES) is exactly what the markup and script produce.
apparent_themes: Single source of truth (mark reuses the shape renderer)
Brand identity tied to the AI framework
Canonical glyph traced from the logo
intention_signals: Anchors the Vi AI brand mark inside the same generative shape system so the identity can't drift from the vessel vocabulary — the mark is computed, not a pasted image.
novelty: Treating a product/AI brand mark as just another typed shape-type ('vi') in the same renderer, unifying brand and component geometry.
contribution: Contributes the Vi AI-framework mark definition (diamond + traced V) and the principle that the brand mark is a registry-rendered vessel, which a fused system would keep as its AI-identity mark.
summary_for_embedding: A ConceptV brand preview card defining the Vi AI-framework mark as a line-filled diamond vessel carrying the traced V glyph, rendered from CV_SHAPES.markSVG('vi') — the same vessel as the shape system.
intention_for_embedding: To establish Vi's brand mark as a single-sourced, registry-generated vessel rather than a standalone logo asset.
